children.text: Pick a date in the calendar below. The DatePicker fires its `On date selected` custom trigger with payload `{ date: <iso> }`. A page-level workflow listens for that trigger and writes the payload into a variable shown at the bottom.

map.formula: Array.from({length:42},(_,i)=>{const yr=context?.component?.variables?.['dp-v-year-uuid']??new Date().getFullYear();const mo=context?.component?.variables?.['dp-v-month-uuid']??0;const fd=new Date(yr,mo,1).getDay();const dim=new Date(yr,mo+1,0).getDate();const dn=i-fd+1;const inM=dn>=1&&dn<=dim;const d=dn<1?new Date(yr,mo,0).getDate()+dn:(dn>dim?dn-dim:dn);const ds=inM?yr+'-'+String(mo+1).padStart(2,'0')+'-'+String(d).padStart(2,'0'):'';const today=new Date();const tStr=today.getFullYear()+'-'+String(today.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,'0')+'-'+String(today.getDate()).padStart(2,'0');const sel=context?.component?.variables?.['dp-v-selected-date-uuid']||'';const minD=context?.component?.props?.minDate||'';const maxD=context?.component?.props?.maxDate||'';const isDisabled=inM&&((minD&&ds<minD)||(maxD&&ds>maxD));return{day:d,inMonth:inM,dateStr:ds,isToday:ds===tStr,isSelected:ds===sel&&ds.length>0,isDisabled:isDisabled,idx:i}})

children.text: • The DatePicker SC declares a custom trigger `dp-t-on-date-selected` with payload formula `{ date: context?.item?.data?.dateStr }`.

props.className: text-[13px] text-blue-900 dark:text-blue-200

children.text: • Internally, the SC's `dp-wf-select-day` workflow runs `emitComponentTrigger` after writing the date to its instance variable.

props.className: text-[13px] text-blue-900 dark:text-blue-200

children.text: • The instance node here binds `actions: [{ action: "wfOnDatePickerDateSelected" }]` — that page workflow has `trigger: "dp-t-on-date-selected"`, so it runs every time the SC emits, with `context.event = { date: <iso> }`.
